variants.title: Mann Filter CU 2956 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P784479
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.

variants.title: Donaldson P784479 Air Panel, Engine
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P784479 Air Panel, Engine is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, engine applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
